item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
plan='/Users/za/Documents/PROMPTER/longhorizon-work/scenario-06/migration/plan.json'
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read \""'$plan" --session scenario-06-type-check --meta >/dev/null
printf '"'PARSED_TYPES_AND_VALUES\\n'
jq -r '([\"schema_version\",(.schema_version|type),(.schema_version|tostring)]|@tsv), ([\"batch_size\",(.batch_size|type),(.batch_size|tostring)]|@tsv), ([\"rollback_error_rate\",(.rollback_error_rate|type),(.rollback_error_rate|tostring)]|@tsv), ([\"dry_run_first\",(.dry_run_first|type),(.dry_run_first|tostring)]|@tsv)' \""'$plan"
printf '"'RAW_JSON_LITERALS\\n'
rg -n '\"(schema_version|batch_size|rollback_error_rate|dry_run_first)\"' \""'$plan"
jq -e '"'(.schema_version|type)==\"number\" and (.batch_size|type)==\"number\" and (.rollback_error_rate|type)==\"number\" and (.dry_run_first|type)==\"boolean\" and .dry_run_first==true' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
printf '"'TYPE_AND_BOOLEAN_STATUS=PASS\\n'"
